Log:
  multimeida/libv4l: Fix build with -fno-common

  Add a patch from upstream to fix the build of multimedia/libv4l with
  -fno-common, which is the default with llvm 11.

  PR:		248738
  Reported by:	dim
  MFH:		2020Q3
